overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive along an elevated highway through an industrial district with the Kiroshi building, transitioning to a panoramic view of the sprawling Night City skyline. The camera moves smoothly from a forward-facing highway perspective to a sweeping rightward pan revealing the dense urban landscape below.

agents.ego_description: driving forward along the elevated highway, approaching the industrial zone with the large Kiroshi building on the left

entered.detail: massive industrial complex with large white logo on the facade, featuring pipes and industrial architecture
large reddish-brown rocky mountain formation towering behind the industrial buildings
multi-lane highway with concrete barriers, curving gently through the landscape
white concrete highway barrier with red markings visible in foreground

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a smooth drive along an elevated highway in a futuristic industrial district. The massive Kiroshi industrial building dominates the left side while red rock cliffs rise in the background. Sparse traffic moves along the highway under clear afternoon skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic overlook of dense cyberpunk city center

events.description: camera begins panning right to reveal the sprawling cityscape below the highway
view transitions from highway-focused industrial scene to panoramic city vista with skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive while panning the camera right to showcase the sprawling cityscape and downtown skyline below

entered.detail: cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings forming the city center
dense collection of low-rise buildings and industrial structures filling the valley below the highway
large colorful digital advertisement screen visible on the right side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right while continuing forward, transitioning from the industrial highway view to a sweeping panorama of Night City. The Kiroshi building and red cliffs exit the frame left as the downtown skyline and dense industrial shantytown below come into full view. The highway remains visible on the left edge while colorful billboards and smoking smokestacks populate the urban landscape below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a focused drive through an industrial corridor into a sweeping panoramic reveal of a sprawling metropolis. It begins with a smooth forward motion along an elevated highway, where the massive Kiroshi industrial building dominates the left side against a backdrop of red rock cliffs under clear afternoon skies. As the vehicle continues forward, the camera pans right, causing the industrial structures and cliffs to slide out of frame. The scene then expands to reveal the dense urban landscape of Night City, shifting from the highway perspective to a wide view of the downtown skyline and a crowded industrial shantytown below. Finally, the vista opens fully to showcase colorful billboards and smoking smokestacks scattered across the city floor while the highway remains a lingering edge on the left.
